verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I sing a simple song of love to my Savior to my Jesus. I'm grateful for the things You've done, My loving Savior, my precious Jesus.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My heart is glad that You've called me Your own. There's no place I'd rather be than

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In Your arms of love, In Your arms of love, Holding me still, holding me near, In Your arms of love.
